cp:coreProperties.dc:title: Kirra Reference Print Template
cp:coreProperties.dc:subject: Kirra - Blasting Apps
cp:coreProperties.dc:description: "...the line dividing good and evil cuts through the heart of every human being. And who is willing to destroy a piece of his own heart?" - Aleksandr Solzhenitsyn"...whatever you ask for in prayer, believe that you have received it, and it will be yours." - Mark 11:24
